GameID.description: The unique ID of this game

Created.description: The date and time when these odds were first created in US Eastern Time

Updated.description: The date and time of when these odds were last updated (in US Eatern Time). If these are the latest odds for this game; and they have not been updated within the last few minutes; then it indicates that there were problems connecting to the sportsbook.

HomeMoneyLine.description: The sportsbook's moneyline for the home team

AwayMoneyLine.description: The sportsbook's moneyline for the away team

HomePointSpread.description: The sportsbook's run line for the home team

AwayPointSpread.description: The sportsbook's run line for the away team

HomePointSpreadPayout.description: The sportsbook's run line payout for the home team

AwayPointSpreadPayout.description: The sportsbook's run line payout for the away team

OverUnder.description: The total points line as given by the sportsbook

OverPayout.description: The sportsbook's payout for the over

UnderPayout.description: The sportsbook's payout for the under

OddType.description: The market type of the odd (ex: live; pregame; 1st inning; etc)

GameOddOutcomeResults.description: List of outcomes showing results of betting markets that were bet on for the given game
